prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-BLACKKNIFESET-5PC Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Beille Stainless Steel Black Knife Set Kitchen Utensils Home Goods, 5pc Description: A fantastic, multipurpose black knife set for the home cook or chef, that will stand out in any kitchen. This knife set from Beille includes a chef knife, slicing knife, bread knife, utility knife and paring knife, all of which will easily assist with food and meal prep needs in the kitchen.

This matte black knife set is constructed from quality stainless steel, that will ensure optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping, slicing and more. Additionally, the rounded, textured and ergonomically designed handles make for a safe and easy handling experience, while providing an excellent grip.

Featuring a sleek matte black finish, the five piece knife set from Beille is not only functional and reliable, but also a stylish and contemporary alternative to standard stainless steel knives. The black knife set makes a great wedding gift for the newlywed, or as new housewarming gift or Father's Day Gift. Knives are dishwasher safe, but as with all knives, handwashing is preferred and recommended.

Dimensions: Chef Knife 8.0 inch; Carving Knife 8.0 inch; Bread Knife 8.25 inch; Utility Knife 4.25 inch; Paring Knife 3.25 inch Search Terms: college dorm room essentials house warming gifts new home house decor stainless steel knives food prep blades cutlery set sourdough bread kitchen gadgets gifts for him fathers day gifts cooking baking knife sharpeners knives set chef knife home Features: - 5PC KITCHEN KNIFE SET: This matte black knife set from Beille is constructed from quality stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, while rounded, textured ergonomically designed handles make for safe and easy handling and provide a very comfortable grip - 5 PIECE BLACK KNIFE SET: Eye catching black matte finish; set includes a chef knife, slicing knife, bread knife, utility knife and paring knife that will assist with all food and meal prep needs - WEDDING GIFTS: Whether as a standalone gift or bundled with other kitchen essentials, the 5pc stainless steel knife set from Beille makes a great gift for newlyweds, for college dorm rooms or as a housewarming gift too! - DISHWASHER SAFE: Knife set is dishwasher safe however, as for all knives, handwashing is always preferred - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Black; Material: Stainless Steel; Dimensions: Chef Knife 8.0 inch, Bread Knife 8.25 inch, Utility Knife 4.25 inch, Paring Knife 3.25 inch and Carving Knife 8.0 inch === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5pc Black Stainless Steel Knife Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5 Piece Set, Matte Black Finish, Ergonomic Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Chef, Bread, Utility And Paring Knives

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blades, Chef, Bread, Utility, Paring And Slicing Knives, Ergonomic Grip, Dishwasher Safe, Matte Black Finish
